raw.message: 'Damn fun.' 'Wonderful mechanics.' 'A standout in this crowded mobile fighting genre.' - TouchArcade

hook.summary: Rapid-fire character reveals with bold text claiming the game's prestige.
hook.visual_action: Quick cuts between stylized character portraits (Valentine and Cerebella) with dynamic text banners.
hook.text_overlay: ONE OF THE BEST FIGHTING GAMES... ...NOW AVAILABLE ON MOBILE!

scene_flow: Fast-paced character introductions with bold claims about the game's quality.
Introduction of a mobile-exclusive character, Annie of the Stars.
Showcase of high-combo gameplay featuring the new character on a mobile device overlay.
Final victory animation with the game logo and a call to action.
on_screen_text: ONE OF THE BEST FIGHTING GAMES...
audience_proxy: Anime fans and competitive fighting game players seeking high-quality 2D animation on mobile.
